speaker: speaker1
text: I guess I'm just a little nervous . I'm giving everything I have to invoking , and ...

speaker: speaker2
text: and what if it doesn't work out , right ?

speaker: speaker2
text: You need to quit thinking like a loser . invoking is going to kick butt . You know how I know ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Because I won't let it fail .

speaker: speaker1
text: But what about tomorrow ? What if Stars.com decides to go with WebTracker , and not us ?
